PWC: the tax imposes a 5% levy on total annual compensation exceeding $1 million paid to any Seattle-based employee. Note, model does not include the social housig tax given difficulty in estimating how many individuals will earn more than $1M in a firm. Said differently, the four archetypes assume no excess compensation/social housing tax assessed
